_comment: Example queue for runway_render.py. Export from runway_studio.html, or hand-edit. Each job submits one image_to_video call. Fields with defaults can be omitted.

_format.tag: string — groups outputs under assets/video/generated/<tag>/. Use vol5, vol6, vol7, whispers, marketing, scratch, etc.
_format.slug: string — filename stem. Auto-generated from prompt_text if omitted.
_format.source_image: string — local path to the starting frame (relative to repo root or cwd). Base64-encoded into the API call.
_format.prompt_image: alternative to source_image — a public URL or data URI. Use source_image for most cases.
_format.prompt_text: string — the motion / scene direction prompt. Optional but strongly recommended.
_format.seed: integer, optional. Use for reproducible iterations on the same prompt+image.

jobs.prompt_text: slow push-in on the storefront, heat haze rising off the asphalt, the door bell catches the late afternoon sun once
the cassette tape veil sways imperceptibly, a single strand catches a red booth light, slow zoom out reveals the radio tower window behind her
drone shot drifting north over identical cul-de-sacs at dusk, sprinklers come on in synchronized geometry beneath, sodium streetlights flicker on one row at a time
